test: SmolLM2-1.7B LOAO-equivalent external replication (gold standard design)
description: Generates SmolLM2 kappa cache files matching original LOAO protocol exactly: mean-pool embeddings, logit(q_raw), 4 proportional layers. Computes SmolLM2 alpha from 3-dataset LOAO analysis.

why_this_is_gold_standard.convention: logit(q_raw) -- same as the LOAO that produced the [2.43, 3.29] interval
why_this_is_gold_standard.layers: 4 proportional layers (6,12,18,23 of 24) -- same as 25/50/75/100% used in LOAO
why_this_is_gold_standard.analysis: LOAO: fit on 19 other architectures, check if SmolLM2 alpha falls in pre-reg interval

pre_registered_criteria.PR2: Pearson r(pred, obs) for SmolLM2 logit_q >= 0.80 (using train-set alpha/beta/C)
